title: Snake Feathers
body:
# Snake Feathers

Early Colin Ward project, listed among his projects in EverybodyWiki alongside Phonebooks, Chamber Joy, and Bodymeat. Active period unknown — likely early alphabets era (pre-2010 or early 2010s).

## Evidence

On **REMIX09** (December 30, 2009), track 10 is titled "MERCABA [SNAKEFEATHERS]" — Colin remixing his own Snake Feathers project. This is unusual: nearly every other REMIX09 track is a remix of a *different* Denver band's material. The self-remix confirms Snake Feathers had recorded original material by late 2009.

## Research Gaps

- No Snake Feathers Bandcamp, SoundCloud, or other online presence confirmed
- Lineup is unknown — sole Colin Ward project or collaborative?
- Original Snake Feathers recordings not yet located in the archive (no matching folder name found)
- Active years unknown

## Sources

- [EverybodyWiki — Colin Ward (musician and artist)](https://en.everybodywiki.com/Colin_Ward_(musician_and_artist))
- [alphabets REMIX09 — Bandcamp](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/remix09)
